patterns.name: binary-search-py
patterns.testCode:
assert binary_search([1,2,3,4,5], 3) == 2, "mid"
assert binary_search([1,2,3,4,5], 1) == 0, "first"
assert binary_search([1,2,3,4,5], 6) == -1, "missing"
assert binary_search([], 1) == -1, "empty"
patterns.description: Binary search on sorted list — O(log n)

patterns.name: binary-search

patterns.name: memoize-py
patterns.testCode:
calls = 0
def add(a, b):
    global calls
    calls += 1
    return a + b
memo_add = memoize(add)
assert memo_add(1, 2) == 3
assert memo_add(1, 2) == 3
assert calls == 1, f"should cache: {calls}"
patterns.description: Memoize decorator — caches function results by arguments

patterns.name: debounce
patterns.testCode:
const d = debounce(() => {}, 100);
if (typeof d !== 'function') throw new Error("should return function");
patterns.description: Debounce — delays function execution until pause in calls
